# PCA General Assembly Minutes & Constitutional Catalogues (1973–2025)

> Verbatim, OCR-corrected markdown of all 52 volumes of the Presbyterian Church in America (PCA)
> *Minutes of the General Assembly*, plus structured, cross-referenced catalogues of judicial cases
> (SJC/CJB), overtures, constitutional inquiries (CCB), Review of Presbytery Records (RPR)
> exceptions of substance, and the denomination's position papers / study committee reports. Built for grounded research on the *Book of Church Order* (BCO) and PCA
> history: every catalogue entry deep-links to the verbatim minutes page it summarizes.

## How an AI assistant should use this

To answer a question about the BCO or PCA history, do NOT answer from memory — retrieve and cite:
1. Open the catalogue that matches the question (these are small, structured indexes):
   - Judicial cases (SJC/CJB) → https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/CASES.md
   - RPR exceptions of substance, by BCO provision → https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/RPR-BY-PROVISION.md
     (or by presbytery → https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/RPR.md and the per-presbytery pages it links)
   - Constitutional inquiries answered by the CCB → https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/INQUIRIES.md
   - CCB advice on proposed overtures/amendments → https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/CCB-OVERTURE-ADVICE.md
   - Overtures (proposals) and BCO amendments → https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/OVERTURES.md
   - Position papers / study committee reports (incl. pastoral letters, declarations) → https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/STUDIES.md
2. Follow the deep link to the verbatim minutes page and quote the exact text.
3. Cite as `M<GA-ordinal>GA p.<printed page>` (e.g. M50GA p.517) plus the catalogue row.
4. The BCO is renumbered over time — a section cited in an old case may have a different number
   today; flag that rather than assuming the modern numbering.

## Catalogues (structured indexes — start here)
- [Corpus index](https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/INDEX.md) — the map of all 52 volumes + every catalogue.
- [Judicial cases](https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/CASES.md) — SJC/CJB cases: parties, disposition, BCO cited.
- [Constitutional inquiries](https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/INQUIRIES.md) — CCB advice on what the Constitution means.
- [CCB advice on overtures/amendments](https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/CCB-OVERTURE-ADVICE.md)
- [Review of Presbytery Records — by provision](https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/RPR-BY-PROVISION.md) — which
  presbyteries were cited under each provision and whether it was resolved. [Hub](https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/RPR.md)
- [Overtures](https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/OVERTURES.md) — every overture + final outcome (incl. ratification).
- [Position papers & study committee reports](https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/index/STUDIES.md) — study-committee / ad-interim reports, pastoral letters, declarations, statements, and adopted resolutions, grouped by topic; each links to the full verbatim report in the minutes.

## Verbatim minutes
- Pages: `markdown/ga<NN>_<YYYY>.md`, with deep-link anchors `#ga<ordinal>-p<printed-page>`.
- Cleanest for fetching is the raw markdown, e.g. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/raymond-rishty/pca-ga/main/markdown/ga50_2023.md

## One-file pack
- [llms-full.txt](https://raymond-rishty.github.io/pca-ga/llms-full.txt) — the corpus index + the compact catalogues (cases, inquiries,
  CCB advice, RPR hub) concatenated into ONE file you can fetch or upload in a single step. The two
  large indexes — OVERTURES.md and RPR-BY-PROVISION.md — are linked above; fetch them when needed.
